topic: non-invasive prediction of liver fibrosis progression in MASLD patients

sample.setting: 3-center cohort, mainland China, recruited 2018-2022, mean follow-up 3.4y
sample.primary_outcome: liver-fibrosis progression by ≥1 stage on 2nd biopsy

statistical_methods.primary_analysis: Cox proportional hazards with time-varying covariates
statistical_methods.sensitivity: E-value for unmeasured confounding; complete-case analysis
statistical_methods.alpha: two-tailed p < 0.05; Bonferroni for the 3 secondary endpoints

bias_considerations: healthy-volunteer bias on follow-up biopsy refusal — sensitivity by inverse-probability weighting
misclassification of fibrosis stage between centers — central pathology re-read for 20% sample
residual confounding from diet — addressed by E-value sensitivity analysis
